prompt: Add the player in the reference image to the left of the source image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Add the player shown in image 2 to the left of the player already present in image 1. The added player should visually align with the style and appearance of the player in image 2.
objects: Player in a yellow Lakers jersey (from Image 1)
